_about: Recorded Phase 2 paired runs (in-session subagents, same session model both arms; with_skill read the named skill's docs, baseline answered from parametric knowledge only). 3 runs per arm over the 7-task corpus. Answers verbatim from the run outputs.

1.answer: Runtime checks -> hook_runtime_requirements(); update-time checks -> hook_update_requirements(); install-time checks -> a class implementing Drupal\Core\Extension\InstallRequirementsInterface (its static getRequirements() method) placed at src/Install/Requirements/<Module>Requirements.php. The combined hook_requirements($phase) is deprecated as of Drupal 11.2.
drupal/ai 1.4.x (like 1.3.x) requires Drupal core ^10.5 || ^11.2. (Higher core floor than DKAN's ^10.2.) Verify with `composer show drupal/ai | grep drupal/core`.

Inject MetastoreService (class Drupal\metastore\MetastoreService), service ID dkan.metastore.service. Load with $service->get('dataset', $uuid), which returns a RootedJsonData object. Add dkan:dkan_metastore to your module's *.info.yml dependencies.

Functional tests carry @group functionalN where N is 1-3 (functional1, functional2, functional3) so CircleCI's parallelized split picks them up; node 0 runs the non-functional suite. Every DKAN test also carries @group dkan.
No. accrualPeriodicity in DKAN's POD / DCAT-US v1.1 schema is a closed enum of ISO-8601 repeating intervals (or the literal 'irregular'); plain words like 'quarterly' are invalid. Quarterly is R/P3M.

Plugin in src/Plugin/Tool/, attribute #[Tool], base class Drupal\mcp_server\Plugin\ToolPluginBase. Handler contract from the SDK's ToolHandlerInterface (0.6 API): public function execute(array $arguments, ClientGateway $gateway): mixed. Override defaultConfiguration() => ['enabled' => TRUE]. checkAccess(AccountInterface $account): AccessResultInterface expresses the gate but is NOT auto-called on tools/call — enforce via a RequestEvent subscriber (throwing McpAuthorizationDeniedException) or mcp_server_oauth. uses Mcp\Server\ClientGateway.

datastore_query_api — a key in dkan_js_frontend.config surfaced into window.drupalSettings; the React library's useDatastore reads it to choose the datastore route. A mismatch yields empty data tables.

2.answer: (1) Runtime/status-report checks -> hook_runtime_requirements(); (2) update-time gate -> hook_update_requirements() (in .install); (3) install-time -> a class implementing Drupal\Core\Extension\InstallRequirementsInterface with a static getRequirements(): array, at src/Install/Requirements/<Module>Requirements.php. The combined hook_requirements($phase) is deprecated.
drupal/ai 1.4.x (and 1.3.x) requires Drupal core ^10.5 || ^11.2. This is a higher core floor than DKAN's own ^10.2.

Inject the MetastoreService, service ID dkan.metastore.service (class Drupal\dkan_metastore\MetastoreService). Load a dataset by UUID with get('dataset', $uuid), which returns RootedJsonData (not an array). Add dkan:dkan_metastore to the module's *.info.yml.

DKAN splits functional tests across CI nodes using three @group identifiers: functional1, functional2, and functional3. In the CircleCI phpunit job (parallelism: 4), node 0 runs the non-functional suite with --exclude-group functional1,functional2,functional3, and nodes 1-3 each run --group functional1 / functional2 / functional3. So tag a new functional test @group functional1 (or 2 or 3) plus @group dkan.
No — 'quarterly' is not valid. accrualPeriodicity is a closed enum of ISO-8601 repeating intervals (plus 'irregular'); plain words fail validation. The correct value for quarterly is R/P3M.

Plugin under src/Plugin/Tool/, attribute #[Tool], base class ToolPluginBase, handler execute(array $arguments, ClientGateway $gateway): mixed (contract from the SDK ToolHandlerInterface). Native plugins opt in via defaultConfiguration() => ['enabled' => TRUE]. Access gating is TWO parts: (a) override checkAccess() on the plugin, and (b) a RequestEvent subscriber that actually enforces it — checkAccess() is declared but NOT auto-called on tools/call. Or enable mcp_server_oauth. uses Mcp\Server\ClientGateway.

The datastore_query_api key in the dkan_js_frontend.config object (default false). Surfaced into window.drupalSettings; flips which datastore query route/endpoint style the React app's component library calls.

3.answer: Drupal 11.2 split hook_requirements() into: (1) runtime/status-report -> hook_runtime_requirements(); (2) update-time gate -> hook_update_requirements() (in .install); (3) install-time -> a class implementing Drupal\Core\Extension\InstallRequirementsInterface with a static getRequirements() method, at src/Install/Requirements/<Module>Requirements.php.
drupal/ai 1.4.x (the 1.3.x-1.4.x line) requires Drupal core ^10.5 || ^11.2. Higher core floor than DKAN's own ^10.2. Verify with: composer show drupal/ai | grep drupal/core.

Inject the metastore service MetastoreService, service ID dkan.metastore.service (class Drupal\dkan_metastore\MetastoreService). Load by UUID with get('dataset', $uuid) — returns RootedJsonData. Add dkan:dkan_metastore to .info.yml.

Every DKAN test carries @group dkan. Functional tests are additionally bucketed into @group functional1, functional2, and functional3 — the identifiers CircleCI uses to split functional tests across nodes (node 0 runs --exclude-group functional1,functional2,functional3 for unit/kernel; nodes 1-3 each run one). functional0/untagged is NOT used by CI.
No — 'quarterly' is not valid. accrualPeriodicity in POD / DCAT-US v1.1 is a closed enum of ISO-8601 repeating intervals (plus 'irregular'). The correct value representing quarterly is R/P3M.

Class in src/Plugin/Tool/ with #[Tool] attribute, extending Drupal\mcp_server\Plugin\ToolPluginBase. execute() signature: public function execute(array $arguments, \Mcp\Server\ClientGateway $gateway): mixed (contract inherited from the SDK ToolHandlerInterface). The #[Tool] flags (readOnly/destructive) are only client hints; checkAccess() is declared but NOT auto-called on tools/call. To gate: override checkAccess() AND register an EventSubscriber on Mcp\Event\RequestEvent that throws McpAuthorizationDeniedException when denied. defaultConfiguration() => ['enabled' => TRUE] or it won't appear in tools/list.

The config key is datastore_query_api, on the dkan_js_frontend.config object (default false). Surfaced into window.drupalSettings, where useDatastore reads it to choose the datastore route (resourceId vs datasetID style). Must match the route shape the deployed backend serves.

1.answer: Runtime checks -> hook_runtime_requirements(); update-time checks -> hook_update_requirements(); install-time checks -> a class implementing Drupal\Core\Extension\InstallRequirementsInterface (placed in src/Install/, e.g. MyModuleInstallRequirements) whose getRequirements() method returns the install-time requirements. The combined hook_requirements($phase) is deprecated.
drupal/ai 1.4.x requires Drupal core ^10.3 || ^11 (composer constraint drupal/core: ^10.3 || ^11). Moderately confident on the ^10.3 floor.
Inject Drupal\metastore\MetastoreService, service ID dkan.metastore.service. Load a dataset item by UUID with $metastore->get('dataset', $uuid). (The underlying storage is dkan.metastore.storage.)

DKAN tags functional tests with @group functional to select them into the CI functional matrix (vs unit/kernel). It also uses @group btb (build-test-broken) for the separate browser/Behat build-test job. So the functional-split group is @group functional. Confidence: moderate.
No, 'quarterly' is not a valid value. POD / DCAT-US v1.1 requires accrualPeriodicity as an ISO 8601 repeating duration. The correct value for quarterly is R/P3M (repeat every 3 months).

namespace Drupal\my_module\Plugin\Mcp\Tool; use Drupal\mcp_server\Attribute\Tool; use Drupal\mcp_server\Plugin\ToolBase; use Mcp\Types\CallToolResult; use Mcp\Types\TextContent; #[Tool(id: 'create_article', name: 'Create Article', description: 'Creates an article node.')] class CreateArticle extends ToolBase { public function execute(array $arguments): CallToolResult { if (!\Drupal::currentUser()->hasPermission('create article content')) { return new CallToolResult([new TextContent('Access denied.')], isError: TRUE); } return new CallToolResult([new TextContent('Created.')]); } } The #[Tool] attribute declares the plugin; it extends ToolBase; execute(array $arguments) returns a Mcp\Types\CallToolResult. Access is gated inside execute() via a Drupal permission check. Confidence: moderate on exact base-class/return-type names for mcp/sdk 0.6.

I'm not confident of the exact key from memory. dkan_js_frontend stores settings under dkan_js_frontend.config; the datastore-query endpoint/style is most likely controlled by a key such as 'datastore_query_endpoint' or an api/root-url setting, but I cannot state the exact key name reliably without checking the module's config schema.

2.answer: Drupal 11.2 split hook_requirements() into three mechanisms: (1) Runtime checks: hook_runtime_requirements(); (2) Update-time checks: hook_update_requirements(); (3) Install-time checks: a class in src/ implementing \Drupal\Core\Extension\InstallRequirementsInterface (its requirements()/getRequirements() method), conventionally at src/Install/Requirements/{ModuleName}Requirements.php.

Inject the metastore service class Drupal\metastore\MetastoreService, service ID dkan.metastore.service. Load a dataset by UUID with $metastore->get('dataset', $uuid) (or getMetastoreItem('dataset', $uuid)).

DKAN splits its functional PHPUnit tests across CircleCI nodes using two @group identifiers: @group functional and @group btb (build-test-baseline). Adding @group functional puts the test in the functional matrix; btb is the separate build-test-baseline group.
No, "quarterly" is not valid. POD / DCAT-US v1.1 expresses accrualPeriodicity as ISO 8601 repeating durations. The correct value for quarterly is R/P3M (a recurring 3-month period).

namespace Drupal\my_module\Plugin\Tool; use Drupal\mcp_server\Attribute\Tool; use Drupal\mcp_server\Plugin\ToolBase; use Mcp\Types\CallToolResult; use Mcp\Types\TextContent; #[Tool(id: 'my_module_create_node', name: 'create_node', description: new TranslatableMarkup('Create a node.'))] class CreateNodeTool extends ToolBase { public function execute(array $arguments): CallToolResult { return new CallToolResult([new TextContent('Created.')]); } } Attribute: #[Tool(...)]. Base class: ToolBase. execute() signature: public function execute(array $arguments): CallToolResult. Access gating: ToolBase exposes an access()/isReadOnly hook; return AccessResult::allowedIfHasPermission($account, 'access content').
The config key is datastore_query_version (under the dkan_js_frontend.config / dkan_js_frontend.settings configuration), which selects which datastore query API style/endpoint the React app uses.

3.answer: hook_requirements() was split into three in Drupal 11.2: (1) hook_runtime_requirements() for runtime checks (the status report), (2) hook_update_requirements() for update-time checks, and (3) a class-based mechanism for install-time checks — a class implementing Drupal\Core\Extension\InstallRequirementsInterface (in src/Install/) whose getRequirements() method returns the install-time requirements.
drupal/ai 1.4.x requires Drupal core ^10.3 || ^11 (composer constraint drupal/core: ^10.3 || ^11). The 1.x line targets Drupal 10.3+ and 11.

Inject the metastore service \Drupal\metastore\MetastoreService, whose service ID is dkan.metastore.service. Load a dataset item by UUID with $metastore->get('dataset', $uuid), which returns the RootedJsonData metadata object.

DKAN's primary group is @group btb ("build-test-branch"), applied to the BrowserTestBase/functional tests. The suite is split across CI nodes using numbered functional groups (e.g. @group functional1, @group functional2, ...) referenced by the parallel test jobs in .circleci.
No. "quarterly" is not valid. POD / DCAT-US v1.1 requires accrualPeriodicity to be an ISO 8601 repeating-duration string. The correct value for quarterly (every 3 months) is R/P3M.

namespace Drupal\my_module\Plugin\Tool; use Drupal\mcp_server\Attribute\Tool; use Drupal\mcp_server\Plugin\ToolBase; use Mcp\Types\CallToolResult; use Mcp\Types\TextContent; #[Tool(id: 'my_module_create_node', name: 'create_node', description: new \Drupal\Core\StringTranslation\TranslatableMarkup('Create a node.'))] class CreateNodeTool extends ToolBase { public function execute(array $arguments): CallToolResult { if (!\Drupal::currentUser()->hasPermission('create article content')) { return new CallToolResult([new TextContent('Access denied.')], isError: TRUE); } $node = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('node')->create(['type' => 'article', 'title' => $arguments['title'] ?? 'Untitled']); $node->save(); return new CallToolResult([new TextContent('Created node ' . $node->id())]); } public function getInputSchema(): array { return ['type' => 'object', 'properties' => ['title' => ['type' => 'string']], 'required' => ['title']]; } } Key points: #[Tool] attribute, extend ToolBase, execute(array $arguments): CallToolResult is the call signature; access is gated inside execute() via a permission check.

The dkan_js_frontend settings live in the dkan_js_frontend.config object. The key that controls which datastore query API the React app calls is its API root/base setting — root_url (the configured DKAN API base the SPA points at).
